meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve Project Stalls
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on freelance projects. Use this intermediate checklist to implement high-converting user onboarding with Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is often a lack of perceived value during the first sixty seconds. By implementing automated, data-driven user onboarding, you bridge the gap between 'signup' and 'aha moment.' This checklist leverages Antigravity for rapid architecture and Claude Code to automate the heavy lifting.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: the initial spark of a new client project fades into a graveyard of half-baked features and mounting technical debt. The excitement of the kickoff meeting is replaced by the crushing reality of scope creep and the inability to define what 'done' actually looks like for your user.

But the bottleneck isn't your coding speed; it's your delivery loop. By mastering user onboarding, you force yourself to define the core value proposition immediately. This isn't just about tooltips; it's about engineering a path to value so clear that your project scope becomes finite, manageable, and highly profitable.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha' Moment
steps.description: Identify the single feature that provides the most value. We will build the onboarding flow to drive the user directly to this action.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project requirements and suggest a 3-step 'Aha' onboarding flow that minimizes friction to core value delivery.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a markdown document defining the core user journey based on my project specs'

steps.title: Architect the Onboarding Schema
steps.description: Create a database schema that tracks onboarding progress to ensure users don't get stuck in loops.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a database schema extension for a 'user_onboarding_status' table tracking steps completed, skipped, and timestamps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add the onboarding_status table to my existing Prisma schema'

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Interstitials
steps.description: Code non-intrusive modals that trigger based on state, not just time, to guide the user.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React hook 'useOnboarding' that checks user progress and triggers conditional modal components.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate the useOnboarding hook and integrate it into the main layout component'

steps.title: Automate Success Metrics
steps.description: Hook into your event tracking so you know exactly where users drop off during onboarding.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a middleware function to track onboarding step completion events to PostHog or segment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement event tracking for the onboarding flow using the existing analytics provider'

steps.title: Finalize and Stress Test
steps.description: Simulate the onboarding process with edge cases to ensure the user is never stranded.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a comprehensive test suite for the onboarding flow covering success, failure, and user-abort scenarios.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate and execute Jest tests for the onboarding logic'

pro_tips: Always build the 'Skip' button first; if users can't skip, they will abandon the entire app.
Use 'State Persistence' to allow users to resume onboarding exactly where they left off if their session expires.
Treat onboarding as a product feature, not a UI overlay; prioritize it in your sprint just like the main dashboard.
Limit your onboarding to 3 steps maximum; anything more is a lecture, not a welcome.
Use 'Progressive Disclosure'—don't show the advanced settings until the user has successfully finished the onboarding flow.
content.next_steps: Once the onboarding flow is live, review your analytics for 48 hours to identify the specific step where users drop off, then iterate on that specific component.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting projects die in the dark. Master the art of the 'Aha' moment and turn your freelance side-hustle into a high-velocity machine. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
